name: Chocolate-Orange Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Egg whites; about 12 large eggs
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 375°F. Move rack to lowest position.
Sift together powdered sugar, cake flour, and cocoa powder.
In a large bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar on medium speed
until foamy. Gradually add granulated sugar in two tablespoon increments,
mixing on high speed until stiff peaks form. Add salt with the last addition
of sugar. Beat until stiff and glossy.
Gradually fold in cocoa mixture until just combined.
Pour batter into an ungreased tube pan, 10x4 inches.
Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until cracks feel dry and top springs back when touched lightly.
Invert pan onto a metal funnel or glass bottle. Let cool completely.
Remove from pan; slice off top of cake about 1 inch down.
Cut into layers 1 inch from outer edge and 1 inch from the hole's edge.
Leave a base of cake that is 1 inch thick. Fill with sherbet and smooth the top.
Replace the top and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until firm.
Serves 16.
